discordpresence.consent.title: Connect to the internet?
discordpresence.consent.body: This mod can use an online connection for:
discordpresence.consent.feature_fallback: Reactions, chat relay, and join/death reports.
discordpresence.consent.footnote: Change anytime in config or with /chatconnect on.
discordpresence.survey.title: Feedback
discordpresence.survey.hint.scale: What's the main reason for your score? (optional)
discordpresence.survey.q.nps: How likely are you to recommend this game to a friend? (0 = not at all, 10 = extremely)
discordpresence.survey.q.bug_report: Did you face any bugs in this run?
discordpresence.survey.q.change_one_thin: If you could change one thing about the mod, what would it be?
discordpresence.autoresponse.alone.0: %s whispers into the void, will anyone answer?
discordpresence.autoresponse.alone.1: %s yells into the darkness, but no one stirs…
discordpresence.autoresponse.alone.2: %s mutters into the ether, hoping for a reply…
discordpresence.autoresponse.alone.3: %s calls out into the silence, who's out there?
discordpresence.autoresponse.alone.4: %s murmurs into the abyss, waiting for an echo…
discordpresence.autoresponse.alone.5: %s screams into the emptiness, is the void listening?
discordpresence.autoresponse.alone.6: %s pleads into the shadows, maybe the world is listening?
discordpresence.autoresponse.alone.7: %s echoes into the wilderness, a voice in the dark…
discordpresence.autoresponse.alone.8: %s cries out into the expanse, perhaps a friend lurks nearby…
discordpresence.autoresponse.alone.9: %s shouts into the nothingness, the silence lingers…
discordpresence.autoresponse.alone.10: %s hollers into the unknown, is anyone there?
discordpresence.autoresponse.alone.11: %s bellows into the open world, will the echo return?
discordpresence.autoresponse.mention_hin: perhaps if %s tagged %s it might land
perhaps if %s tagged %s they might be heard
perhaps if %s tagged %s, someone might finally stir
perhaps if %s tagged %s, the words might find their way
perhaps if %s tagged %s, an answer might come
perhaps if %s tagged %s, the silence might break
perhaps if %s tagged %s, a reply might echo back
perhaps if %s tagged %s, the void might listen
perhaps if %s tagged %s, the message might reach beyond
perhaps if %s tagged %s, an ear might turn their way
perhaps if %s tagged %s, they might not whisper alone
perhaps if %s tagged %s, help might be on the way
